title: HOUSING ASSISTANCE FOR PREGNANT AND PARENTING YOUTH - 211info
text: INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES HOUSING ASSISTANCE FOR PREGNANT AND PARENTING YOUTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides short-term, emergency eviction prevention assistance. 4900 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Age 22 or younger and pregnant and/or parenting. Must have a notice for non-payment. Hours: Not accepting appointments (503) 239-6996 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 239-6996 Main phone Main phone (503) 239-6996 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Voicemails are returned in the order received. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses 12, 77, and 75. Near Hollywood Transit Center. Services: Rent Payment Assistance Rent Payment Assistance * Pregnant Individuals Rental Deposit Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ECHO INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOMESAFE PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING RESOURCES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SEEDS INFORMATION SERVICES - CHRISTINA PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
